purpose: Public-safe metadata for local OpenMW-derived candidate branches that may contain recoverable actor proof work. No source snapshots, binaries, screenshots, or retail assets are stored here.

policy.use: Mine small source slices and reprove them through Nikami Worlds sweeps; do not promote whole lab branches.
